runtime_green_claim_reason: The artifact environment does not include the local vendor directory or host application runtime context.
acceptance_criteria: PowerShell compatibility baseline passes on owner Windows runtime
Symfony container boots in the host application
EasyAdmin /manage surface loads or route surface is visible
host application menu is built around the host runtime
generic Managing layer does not hardcode neighbor component FQCNs
runtime_proof_intake_contract: core_runtime_green=true only when syntax, canon guard, Composer validation, PowerShell compatibility, PHPUnit, and PHPStan all classify as pass; host_integration_green is reported separately from host-container and host-route logs.
runtime_proof_assertion_contract: assert-rc-runtime-proof.php exits 0 only when core_runtime_green is true; with --require-host it also requires host_integration_green.
latest_runtime_fix_focus: PHPUnit runtime constructor error in ManageCrudControllerRuntime
Windows generated-controller exclusion in RC architecture guard
